title: Zaela tree
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Zealapic.jpg|thumb]]
'''Zaela''' was a large [[Tree/Legends|tree]] native to [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] and grown on [[Ohma-D'un/Legends|Ohma-D'un]]. Its long branches were used by the [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] to make [[Gulliball/Legends|Gulliball]] mallets. They were also a food source for the native [[Shiro/Legends|Shiro]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars Episode I: The Gungan Frontier|''Star Wars'' Episode I: ''The Gungan Frontier'']]
